default_strike.text:
Unique equipment.
Before range is chosen in a round of combat, you may put the Shackles on any minion opposing the vampire with this card; you still controls this card, however. Combat ends. The Shackled minion does not unlock as normal during his or her unlock phases; he or she burns 2 blood during each of your unlock phases. Any minion may burn this card as a (D) action.
